Class Hotel

java.lang.Object
pl.edu.agh.kis.pz1.model.Hotel
public class Hotel extends Object
Represents a hotel as a collection of rooms indexed by room number.

Internally uses the project's MyMap implementation to store Room instances. Exposes operations to add rooms, query rooms, list all rooms or only available rooms, and retrieve basic hotel metadata.

    Description

  • Constructor Details

    • Hotel

      public Hotel(String name)
      Creates a Hotel with the given name.
      Parameters:
      name - hotel name

  • Method Details

    • addRoom

      public void addRoom(Room room)
      Adds a room to the hotel.

      If a room with the same number already exists the behavior depends on MyMap.put(K, V) (typically it will replace the previous entry).

      Parameters:
      room - room to add

    • getRoom

      public Room getRoom(int roomNumber)
      Returns the Room with the specified room number or null if not found.
      Parameters:
      roomNumber - room number
      Returns:
      Room instance or null when absent

    • hasRoom

      public boolean hasRoom(int roomNumber)
      Returns whether the hotel contains a room with the given number.
      Parameters:
      roomNumber - room number
      Returns:
      true if the room exists, false otherwise

    • listRooms

      public List<Room> listRooms()
      Returns a list of all rooms in the hotel.
      Returns:
      list of Room instances; never null (may be empty)

    • listAvailableRooms

      public List<Room> listAvailableRooms()
      Returns a list of available (vacant) rooms.
      Returns:
      list of available Room instances; may be empty

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns the hotel name.
      Returns:
      hotel name

    • getTotalRooms

      public int getTotalRooms()
      Returns the total number of rooms registered in the hotel.
      Returns:
      number of rooms

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a short human-readable description of the hotel.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      descriptive string for the hotel
